prompt: A grotesque creature stands in a disturbing, asymmetrical pose. Its spine is unnaturally contorted, with the upper body severely hunched and twisted to one side. The neck is hyper-extended at a sickening angle, causing the head to loll to the shoulder. Both arms hang limply with fingers twitching erratically. The creature exhibits constant, shallow spasms in the torso and limbs, creating a restless and predatory rhythm. The legs are bent at awkward angles, with the weight shifting slowly and unsteadily from one foot to the other as if struggling against gravity.
